name: calculate_goal_probability
description: Monte Carlo simulation for a savings goal. Reads target amount and deadline from the portfolio — you only need to provide the goal name and monthly contribution. Returns success probability, p10/p50/p90 outcomes, and the monthly contribution needed for 80% success.

goal_name.description: Name of the goal as it appears in the portfolio (e.g. 'home', 'retirement', 'car'). Partial match supported.

monthly_contribution.description: Monthly amount the user plans to contribute (INR)

expected_annual_return_pct.description: Expected annual portfolio return percentage. Defaults to 10.

annual_volatility_pct.description: Annual portfolio volatility percentage. Defaults to 15.
